title: oxalis setifera
intro: Oxalis setifera, also known as the hairy wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the oxalis genus that belongs to the family Oxalidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oxalis setifera include its potential to help with urinary tract issues and its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Oxalis setifera can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
